PuzzleBoard - Class in dev.quassel.ga.puzzle
Immutable sliding-puzzle board.

Move-sequence candidate for the sliding-puzzle domain.

PuzzleDomain - Class in dev.quassel.ga.puzzle
Sliding-puzzle domain plugged into the generic GA core.
PuzzleDomain(PuzzleBoard, int, int) - Constructor for class dev.quassel.ga.puzzle.PuzzleDomain
Creates one puzzle domain around a fixed start board and candidate length range.
PuzzleRunRequest - Record Class in dev.quassel.ga.puzzle
Request payload for starting one puzzle run through the local runtime/API.

Creates an instance of a PuzzleRunRequest record class.
PuzzleRuntimeAdapter - Class in dev.quassel.ga.puzzle
Boundary adapter that plugs the sliding puzzle into the generic runtime.

Central control-plane server that tracks workers and routes run requests.

Starts a registry server on the given host and port.
request() - Method in record class dev.quassel.ga.core.RunMetadata
Returns the value of the request record component.
requestPause() - Method in class dev.quassel.ga.core.SearchRun
Requests the run to pause at the next safe synchronization point.
requestResume() - Method in class dev.quassel.ga.core.SearchRun
Resumes a previously paused run.
requestStop() - Method in class dev.quassel.ga.core.SearchRun
Requests the run to stop at the next safe synchronization point.

Starts or executes one run inside the registry-managed executor.

Runs the GA against an externally supplied runtime object.

Returns the value of the runId record component.
runId() - Method in class dev.quassel.ga.core.SearchRun
Returns the unique run identifier.

Creates an empty in-memory run registry.
RunRegistry.RunLauncher<C> - Interface in dev.quassel.ga.core
Callback used by the registry-managed executor to run one search.
RunResult<C> - Record Class in dev.quassel.ga.core

status() - Method in class dev.quassel.ga.core.SearchRun

TspCandidate - Class in dev.quassel.ga.tsp
One round-trip candidate represented as a permutation of city indices.
TspCandidate(List<Integer>) - Constructor for class dev.quassel.ga.tsp.TspCandidate
Creates a route candidate from a permutation of city indices.
TspDomain - Class in dev.quassel.ga.tsp
Travelling-salesman domain on a randomly generated 2D map.
TspDomain(List<TspDomain.City>) - Constructor for class dev.quassel.ga.tsp.TspDomain
Creates a fixed-map TSP domain.
TspDomain.City - Record Class in dev.quassel.ga.tsp
One fixed city on the TSP map.
TspRunRequest - Record Class in dev.quassel.ga.tsp
Request payload for one travelling-salesman run.

Creates an instance of a TspRunRequest record class.
TspRuntimeAdapter - Class in dev.quassel.ga.tsp
Boundary adapter that plugs the travelling-salesman problem into the runtime.
